title: Unfinished Items
description: FOSS Minecraft Plugin For Creating and Updating Custom Items With AuraSkills Support. Setting any attributes and wearable items!
body:
# Unfinished Items

## Dependencies
- [AuraSkills 2.3.10](https://modrinth.com/plugin/auraskills/version/2.3.10) (other versions might work)

## About
Unfinished Items is a completely free and open source Minecraft plugin for easily creating custom items via YAML script.

### Features
- Creating custom items via YAML (yeah i know. shocking.)
- Custom item display name with formatting support!
- Custom item lore(description) with formatting support!
- Uncomplicated custom item attributes. Don't need to think about base values or any of that. Just type in what makes sense in-game!
- [AuraSkills](https://modrinth.com/plugin/auraskills) stats support (requirement mandatory for now)
- Custom recipes!
- Reload custom items and recipes without restarting the server via command!
- Force custom items to be unstackable!
- Set potion effects when wearing or holding items!
- Update all custom items on reload! You can just change their values and all the custom items in the world will be updated on reload! Specifics on the [wiki](https://codeberg.org/Unfinished632/unfinished-items/wiki).
- Prevent custom items from being renamed in anvils! (can't be turned off for now)
- Prevent custom items from being placed down! (can't be turned off for now)
- Wear non-armor custom items on your head! Specifics on the [wiki](https://codeberg.org/Unfinished632/unfinished-items/wiki)
- Multi-language support for attributes and error messages!
Built-in languages:
  - English(obviously)
  - Turkish

### Planned Features:
- Multi-language support for item names
- Custom actions
